sections.subtitle: Current Form
sections.text: KVC Westerlo has struggled recently, losing 3 of their last 5 matches, with a poor defensive record (conceding 5 goals in their last league game). SV Zulte Waregem, on the other hand, has shown more consistency with 2 wins and 2 draws in their last 5, though their scoring has been limited.

sections.subtitle: Head-to-Head Record
sections.text: The last two encounters between these teams resulted in a 2-0 win for Westerlo at home and a 1-1 draw away. Matches between them often see both teams scoring, with 9 out of 10 recent head-to-head games having goals from both sides.

sections.subtitle: Season Statistics
sections.text: Westerlo's defense is a major concern, ranking last in goals conceded (5 in 1 league game), while their attack has managed 2 goals. Zulte Waregem also struggles offensively (1 goal in league play) but has been more solid defensively, conceding just 1 goal.

sections.subtitle: Key Trends
sections.text: Westerlo games often feature over 2.5 goals (9/9 recent home games), and they frequently concede first. Zulte Waregem's matches tend to be low-scoring (6/7 under 2.5 goals), suggesting a cautious approach.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Half-time overview
halftimeSections.text: At half-time, KVC Westerlo leads SV Zulte Waregem by a score of 2-1 in an engaging encounter at Het Kuipje. Westerlo struck early with a goal right at the start and added another shortly after, establishing a strong position. Zulte Waregem responded with a goal of their own around the half-hour mark, keeping the game competitive. Both teams have shown moments of quality, but Westerlo's slight edge in possession and clinical finishing have given them the upper hand so far.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Attack momentum
halftimeSections.text: The first half saw fluctuating attacking spells between the two sides. Westerlo started with intense pressure, dominating the early minutes with consistent forward pushes. Their momentum was particularly strong in the opening stages and again around the midway point of the half, where they maintained control for a prolonged period. Zulte Waregem, on the other hand, had notable attacking spells later in the half, especially towards the end of the first 45 minutes, showing resilience and intent to level the score. The momentum shifted back and forth, with both teams having their share of dangerous moments.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Team performance
halftimeSections.text: KVC Westerlo has shown a balanced approach in the first half, with a slight edge in ball possession and a strong presence in the final third. Their ability to enter the penalty area and win duels, especially in the air, has been impressive. Defensively, they've held firm for the most part, with key clearances helping to maintain their lead. SV Zulte Waregem, despite trailing, has not been far behind. They've managed more shots on target and have penetrated the penalty area frequently, indicating potential for a comeback. However, their struggles in duels and lack of possession wins in the final third have hindered their efforts.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Key players
halftimeSections.text: For Westerlo, Josimar Alcócer has been a standout, not only scoring but also contributing to the team's attacking play with key passes. Griffin Yow also made an immediate impact with an early goal, setting the tone for the game. On the defensive end, Emin Bayram has been crucial with multiple clearances and an assist. For Zulte Waregem, Jeppe Erenbjerg's goal has kept them in contention, while Joseph Opoku's involvement in creating opportunities has been notable. Both teams rely on these players to drive their respective strategies in the second half.

halftimeSections.subtitle: Second half expectations
halftimeSections.text: The second half promises to be an intriguing battle as Zulte Waregem will likely push hard for an equalizer, given their attacking intent towards the end of the first half. Westerlo, with a narrow lead, may look to consolidate defensively while seeking counter-attacking opportunities to extend their advantage. Given the number of penalty area entries and shots on target from both sides, there is a good chance for more goals. Westerlo’s ability to maintain their defensive structure and exploit Zulte Waregem’s weaknesses in duels could be decisive. On the other hand, Zulte Waregem needs to capitalize on their final third entries to turn the tide.
